description: Uncensored 8B model with function calling, coding, and math. No content restrictions.
fullDescription:
## MODEL OVERVIEW
Dolphin 3.0 Llama 3.1 8B is the next generation of the Dolphin series of instruct-tuned models designed to be the ultimate general purpose local model. It supports coding, math, agentic functions, function calling, and general use cases.

## Key Features
- **Uncensored**: No artificial content restrictions or refusals
- **Function Calling**: Native tool use and API interaction
- **128K Context**: Large context window for complex tasks
- **8B Parameters**: Compact and fast
- **Local Control**: Full control over system prompts, model versions, alignment tuning, and data privacy
- **Versatile**: Supports coding, math, agentic functions, and general tasks

## Specifications
- Parameters: 8B
- Context Length: 128K tokens
- Default Size: 4.9GB (Q4_K_M)
- Architecture: Llama 3.1 based

## Use Cases
- Unrestricted AI assistance
- Tool use and function calling
- Code generation and math
- Creative writing without limitations
- Custom AI agent building with full local control
modelReadme:
Dolphin 3.0 Llama 3.1 8B is the next generation of the Dolphin series of instruct-tuned models designed to be the ultimate general purpose local model. It supports coding, math, agentic functions, function calling, and general use cases.

Unlike cloud-based alternatives that maintain control of the system prompt, deprecating and changing things as they wish, Dolphin prioritizes user autonomy. With a local model you maintain control over the system prompt, you decide which version, you can tune the alignment to your own preferences, and your data stays private.
name: dolphin3-8b
title: Dolphin 3 8B
